title: hypelichrysum heterotrichum
intro: Hypelichrysum heterotrichum, also known as the yellow everlasting or small yellow daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hypelichrysum heterotrichum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be dried to make a herbal powder for further use.
